events.event_description: William Phillips presented credentials as Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary, establishing the U.S. Legation in Canada.

evidence.quote: William Phillips, Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1927-02-17. Credentials presented: 1927-06-01. Left post on 1929-12-14.

events.event_description: Ray Atherton was promoted from Envoy/Minister to Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary, elevating the U.S. mission in Canada from a Legation to an Embassy.

evidence.quote: Ray Atherton, Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1943-07-08. Credentials presented: 1943-08-03. Promoted to Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary 1943-11-19.
